name: create_table_document_from_prototype
description: Create a table document from the installed gear-parameter table prototype, set one table cell, save, reopen, and verify.

args.source_path: absolute .grb prototype path, optional; category default is used when omitted
args.prototype_id: catalog id, optional; category default is used when omitted
args.text_value: new text/value where applicable; category default is used when omitted
